arts.ttl: Manchester United step up interest in Atalanta’s Ederson
arts.sum: Atalanta's Ederson has emerged as one of the most sought-after midfielders in European football, with Manchester United intensifying their interest in the Brazilian star. The 25-year-old's impressive performances have been crucial to Atalanta's success this season, as they currently sit second in Serie A and are performing well in the Champions League. The post Manchester United step up interest in Atalanta’s Ederson appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag signed 15 players at Manchester United - but Ruben Amorim might sell eight
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is working with the squad that Erik ten Hag built during his two-and-a-half-years as Man Utd boss.

arts.ttl: Mouse problem compounds Manchester United’s Old Trafford woes
arts.athr: Robyn Vinter North of England correspondent
arts.sum: Rodent sightings cause club’s food hygiene rating to tumble at century-old stadium already afflicted by roof leaks While matchday punters pay huge sums to see their heroes, it seems rodents have found a way to get into Old Trafford for free, leaving behind Christmas gifts for the food hygiene inspector to find. Manchester United’s food hygiene rating tumbled to two stars out of five on the most recent inspection, after mouse droppings were found in a kiosk that sells food to fans and a ground-level corporate suite. arts.sum: It would appear that Marcus Rashford’s time at Man United is slowly but surely coming to an end, and former professional turned outspoken pundit, Stan Collymore, has suggested that it’s not before time.
